description_long: This bungalow features a simple rectangular structure with a prominent gable roof in a dark gray color. The front facade has two symmetrically placed square windows and a small protruding entryway. One long side of the building is dominated by a large set of windows, likely serving as a living area with ample natural light, while the opposite side has three evenly spaced windows and a visible chimney. The rear gable end is almost entirely glass, suggesting a modern touch and possibly an open-plan interior. The building sits on a flat, raised platform, and the exterior walls are a light, neutral color. The overall design is minimalistic and modern, with clean lines and a focus on functionality.
description: A modern, rectangular bungalow with a dark gable roof, large glass windows, and a minimalistic light facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing two square windows and a small entryway on a plain light facade.
description_view_1: Side view with a long stretch of large windows and a visible chimney on the roof.
description_view_2: Rear gable end dominated by a large glass wall, giving a modern, open appearance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with three evenly spaced windows and the chimney visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows, large glass rear gable, grouped side windows
